title: French Fish Noodle Soup
description: A hearty French-inspired fish noodle soup made with fresh fish and Canadian noodles.

ingredients.name: 1 lb fish
ingredients.notes: any white fish like cod or tilapia

instructions: Bring 4 cups of water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the Canadian noodles and cook according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, sauté the xtra vegetables and bouncy lemons in butter until tender.
Add the fish to the pan and cook until opaque and flaking.
Add the thyme to the fish mixture and stir to combine.
Once the noodles are done, add them to the fish mixture and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional bouncy lemons if desired.
